title: it's not that difficult!!!
content:
an email from a friend ...

!/gallery/misc/sk_mail.gif!


first of all - after all the years you've worked with me, you still can't get my name right! it's not that difficult (unlike your lastname), dude!

secondly, i'm seriously hoping that it has nothing to do with my code (or even XHTML, for that matter). but talking about XHTML, mabbe i should try changing the document type to HTML4. hmmm ... interesting. (but it means that i'll have to remove all of the /> from the code too!!)

oh if it's the problem with OS9/IEMac, i don't think it's an isolated incident already. :)

 %(me)my intention is to complain about how you spell my name. but you can consider this a reply too. heheheh ...%
